name: Lady Isabella Sterling
message: We are hosting an exclusive summer garden party at Sterling Manor and would love to commission a bespoke cellar collection of 50 miniature Royal Black jars as guest favors. Do you offer custom gold-leaf engraving for the glass bottles?

name: Chef Kenji Sato
message: I am designing a new seasonal 9-course pairing menu in Tokyo. The Wild Forest honey exhibits spectacular resinous, herbal notes that would perfectly complement our roasted duck glazed in red miso. Can we establish a direct wholesale allocation?

name: Dr. Aris Vance
message: Fascinated by your raw single-origin honey's micro-pollen density and enzymatic purity. Our lab is conducting bio-active assays on native propolis. We would love to collaborate or receive a laboratory sample of your high-altitude comb.
